extensionDescription.message: Records only the time of a single tap for a taken dose. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

purposeText.message: This saves only the time of a single tap to this device's Chrome storage. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

tapButtonDescription.message: Save the current time as one record.

onboardingGuideCopy.message: Right after taking a dose, tap the button above once to save the latest time and add it to recent records.

emptyLatestRecord.message: After your first record, the latest time will appear here.

emptyHistoryRecords.message: After recording, your $COUNT$ most recent records will appear here.

clearButtonDescription.message: Delete all records saved on this device.

confirmClear.message: Delete all records saved on this device?

firstRunGuide.message: To start, tap the large button once right after taking a dose.

privacyNote.message: Nothing is sent outside the extension. Storage is Chrome storage only.

premiumCopy.message: Premium is a $PRICE$ one-time purchase with a $DAYS$-day trial. The recording feature works even when Premium is inactive.

storageError.message: Could not read or write storage.
